## PHON freeze check

- [ ] No change to PHON token structure / balance logic / API signatures / staking / claim / schema.
- [ ] Critical money path PHON logic is read-only (performance only, no semantic change).

## Phase

- [ ] Phase 1 — Old architecture lockdown
- [ ] Phase 2 — Runtime detox (setInterval extermination)
- [ ] Phase 3 — Giant component surgery
- [ ] Phase 4 — Realtime isolation
- [ ] Phase 5 — Layer 1 diet
- [ ] Phase 6 — Global state detox
- [ ] Phase 7 — Fail-soft completion
- [ ] Phase 8 — Operator extraction
